estimated_statistics_not_fitted: 2 gene-length means (control mean + global perturbed training mean) = 2G = 10,000 at G=5000
notes: Emits one global mean-shift vector as the prediction for every test perturbation; no per-perturbation quantity at all.

estimated_statistics_not_fitted: control mean (G) + control covariance Sigma (G(G+1)/2) = 12,507,500 at G=5000 — plug-in sample moments of the control cells, shared across all perturbations, never optimised
notes: Prediction is exactly a_hat * Sigma[:,g]; verified numerically to be rank-1 (1 degree of freedom per perturbation). Few-shot: a_hat is fit on that perturbation's own training cells.
100% trainable from scratch; no pretrained checkpoint. P_go is the number of GO perturbation-graph nodes, not the dataset's perturbation count.

fitted_parameters_formula: encoders+decoders+MINE critic with hidden=512, latent=30, GenePT dim=3072
notes: GenePT 3072-d perturbation embeddings are frozen inputs, not trainable parameters. All 5 submodules (2 encoders, 2 decoders, MINE critic) are trained.
A single multi-output linear map from frozen 3072-d GenePT embeddings to gene expression change: coef_ (G x 3072) + intercept_ (G). alpha is a regularisation hyperparameter, not a fitted parameter.
Encoder MLP G->2048->512->64 and generator MLP (64+3072)->2048->G, trained from scratch. GenePT embeddings are frozen inputs.

fitted_parameters_formula: fixed: V*d + transformer(12 layers, d=512, d_hid=512) + heads, with V=60697 gene vocabulary
notes: Pretrained scGPT_human backbone loaded then fully fine-tuned: all 51.86M parameters receive gradients (no freezing). Count verified two ways: instantiation and summing the 205MB checkpoint state_dict.
